sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Lord Mischa Myrmel
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Lord Mischa Myrmel
lines.text: The tithes are growing weak. That werewolf needs to do a better job of keeping them fed.

lines.speaker: Lord Mischa Myrmel
lines.text: There's no shortage of corpses around here. The dead can still have some uses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're feeding them corpses? No wonder they're becoming weak. That meat must have all sorts of problems.

lines.speaker: Lord Mischa Myrmel
lines.text: What else would you have me feed them? If I give them nicer food, I'm wasting more money than if I were to just kill them and buy some more.
